task_completion.description: Open the drone_racing_synthetic.wbt world in Webots
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Webots simulator GUI is open, and the title bar or 3D view indicates that 'drone_racing_synthetic.wbt' is loaded.

task_completion.description: Locate and select the fpv_camera node
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Webots scene tree pane (usually on the left), the 'RACING_DRONE' node is expanded, and the 'fpv_camera' node is visible and selected.
In the Webots field editor pane (usually below the scene tree), the 'noise' field is set to 0.05 and the 'motionBlur' field is set to 20.0 for the fpv_camera.

task_completion.description: Add a Lens node to the camera
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the scene tree pane, a 'Lens' node is visible as a child or field under the 'fpv_camera' node.

task_completion.description: Configure radialCoefficients of the Lens node
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the field editor pane for the newly added Lens node, the 'radialCoefficients' field is set to 0.35 and -0.1.

task_completion.description: Save the modified world to the correct path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save World As...' dialog is open pointing to '/home/ga/Desktop/drone_fpv_realistic.wbt', OR the Webots window title bar updates to show 'drone_fpv_realistic.wbt' indicating the file was successfully saved.

integrity.description: Agent used the Webots GUI to make modifications
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Webots scene tree and field editor, rather than a text editor (like nano, vim, or gedit) editing the .wbt file directly.

integrity.description: Agent did not use a script to bypass manual configuration
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of the agent writing and executing a Python or Bash script to automatically parse and modify the .wbt file in the terminal.

integrity.description: Agent saved the file from within Webots
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should use the 'File -> Save World As...' menu option in Webots, rather than just copying the original file to the Desktop using terminal commands.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target camera is named 'fpv_camera'. The expected configuration values are: noise = 0.05 (tolerance 0.01), motionBlur = 20.0 (tolerance 1.0), and Lens radialCoefficients = 0.35 and -0.1 (tolerance 0.05). The final world must be saved exactly to '/home/ga/Desktop/drone_fpv_realistic.wbt'.
